channel.title: Predictive Shielding on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Predictive Shielding on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: Containing a domain compromise: How predictive shielding shut down lateral movement
item.description:
Microsoft describes a real-world domain compromise where exposure-based containment and predictive shielding were used to slow lateral movement, stop credential abuse, and interrupt the attacker’s progress.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: security: Case study: How predictive shielding in Defender stopped GPO-based ransomware before it started
item.description:
Microsoft Defender blocked a human-operated ransomware attack that used Group Policy Objects (GPOs) to disable defenses and deploy encryption at scale. Predictive shielding hardened 700 devices in time, preventing any GPO-based encryptions and blocking most of the attempted impact.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog
